description: Dwarves are solidly built, with broad shoulders and thick frames. They are known for their resilience, craftsmanship, and connection to stone.

trait.Darkvision.description: You can see in dim light within 120 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

trait.Dwarven Resilience.description: You have resistance to Poison damage. You have advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Poisoned condition.

trait.Dwarven Toughness.description: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 every time you gain a level.

trait.Languages.description: You can speak, read, and write Common and Dwarvish.
